info.title: Ritmo Studio API
info.description: Ritmo Studio M1 REST surface. Generated from the @ritmofit/shared Zod schemas — the single source of truth. All endpoints except the auth bootstrap require a Better Auth session.

get.summary: Fetch caller profile
List visible classes (owned ∪ shared), optionally paginated

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Page size. Supplying limit or cursor enables keyset pagination; cursor without limit uses 30.

parameters.name: cursor
parameters.description: Opaque continuation cursor from the prior response header.

parameters.name: tag
parameters.description: Filter to classes carrying this tag (trimmed + lowercased). Composes with pagination.

X-RitmoFit-Next-Cursor.description: Opaque cursor for the next page; absent on the final page.

get.summary: Fetch a class
Versioned single-fetch live payload

post.description: Multipart JPEG, PNG, or WebP; maximum 5242880 bytes (5 MiB).

400.description: Missing file, or not a JPEG/PNG/WebP image

post.summary: Add a tag to a class (edit). Tag is lowercased; duplicates are no-ops.

400.description: Tag must be a non-empty string

delete.summary: Remove a tag from a class (edit)

post.summary: Import a public Spotify, SoundCloud, or Apple Music catalog playlist URL as class tracks (edit).

400.description: Invalid or unsupported playlist URL, or empty playlist

get.summary: Serve a stored cover image from R2
List class_tracks in position order

post.summary: Copy a class_track with its cues/moves

get.summary: List cues
List placed moves
List global library moves
The caller's songs choreographed with this global move
List the caller's custom moves
The caller's songs choreographed with this custom move
Fetch a track with provider ids

post.summary: Resolve a track to a playable provider by same-song catalog search

200.description: A strong match was attached, or candidates to confirm

post.summary: Fill display_bpm from a third-party BPM provider (M2; never Spotify)

200.description: Track (with display_bpm applied if a confident match was found)

get.summary: Search a configured music provider catalog
List the caller's liked tracks (M2; spends their per-user OAuth token)
List the caller's saved playlists (D21; spends their per-user OAuth token)
List tracks in one saved playlist for browse/drill-in (D21; spends their per-user OAuth token)

post.summary: Bulk-import a saved playlist as track references (D21; deduped, one bulk op, references only)

200.description: Imported; every song already existed in the library

201.description: Imported; at least one new track created

422.description: Playlist has too many distinct tracks to import at once

post.summary: Import a provider candidate into the library

200.description: Resolved to an existing track (idempotent / same-song attach)

409.description: Another user's library already holds this provider ref

get.summary: List the caller's provider connections (tokens stripped)

post.summary: Start a provider OAuth connection (returns authorize URL)

get.summary: OAuth redirect target — exchanges the code, then 302s to the SPA

302.description: Redirect to the web app (connected or error)

get.summary: Apple Music developer token + storefront for MusicKit.configure()
Short-lived Spotify access token for the Web Playback SDK

409.description: Not connected, or reconnect required for playback scope

post.summary: Store the Music-User-Token MusicKit returned (encrypted; no refresh)

get.summary: Dev-only mock provider search
List my teams
Fetch a team (member)
List members
List shares on a class (owner)

post.summary: Share a class with a user or team
